description: Style Note If you're looking for a sport-inspired, casual tee which won't let you down in either style or performance, then your search is over! This T-shirt from nike has an ace print on the front, just what you need to perfect your effortlessly fashionable casual look. Product Details Grey T-shirt made of Dri-Fit fabric which pulls away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable, with print, round neck, short sleeves and branding on front Material and Care60% cotton 40% polyester Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron
